name: LookupTxPDU
title: LookupTxPDU
description: Searches for the specified tx PDU. The path must be complete including namespaces and endpoint(s):
You can downcast the result to a concrete type, see the example.
return: The tx PDU. An uninitialized object if the PDU is not found, which will also be reported in the Write Window or as an error in test system (if the function is called in a test routine).
